message:
feat(layout): add RTL layout mirroring support (bd-ic6i.3)

Add FlowDirection, LogicalAlignment, LogicalSides, and mirror_rects_horizontal
to ftui-layout. Flex now supports a flow_direction field that mirrors horizontal
layouts for RTL locales. Includes 23 unit tests covering locale detection,
logical-to-physical resolution, and Flex RTL integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
